headlines.headline: Stephen A. on tanking in the NBA: It's on the owners to care
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith shares his thoughts on the NBA's three comprehensive anti-tanking proposals.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. doubles down after Josh Hart calls him a 'part-time Knicks fan'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reiterates his thoughts on the state of the Knicks after Josh Hart labeled him a "part-time Knicks fan."

headlines.headline: Minor league rehab promo pokes fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal
headlines.description: The Philadelphia Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

headlines.headline: NBA playoff watch: Hawks look to remain red hot
headlines.description: Atlanta is up to fifth in the East. Will the Celtics clip the Hawks' wings? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Thursday.

headlines.headline: Sources: NBA presents 3 comprehensive anti-tanking proposals
headlines.description: The NBA presented three comprehensive anti-tanking concepts to its board of governors Wednesday as part of this week's meetings in New York, with modifications expected to each before a formal vote in May, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

headlines.headline: NBA intel: Spurs title buzz grows among execs, coaches, scouts
headlines.description: San Antonio's title buzz is growing around the league. Plus, new intel on expansion and an East playoff race full of injury questions.

headlines.headline: Bills re-sign Damar Hamlin to one-year contract
headlines.description: The Bills have re-signed safety Damar Hamlin to a one-year contract after his 2025 season was cut short by injury.

headlines.headline: Should the Jets draft Ty Simpson at No. 16?
headlines.description: The "Get Up" crew weighs in on Ty Simpson's private workout with the Jets and how high they should draft him.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest buzz on Ty Simpson, Jeremiyah Love
headlines.description: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4? Our draft experts weigh in with new intel.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Tannenbaum's prospect targets in Rounds 1-7
headlines.description: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

headlines.headline: How Ravens' strong 2022 draft class cashed in for $300 million
headlines.description: Of the 11 players drafted by Baltimore in 2022, only two remain, but there's a pride to their development.

headlines.headline: Bills 2026 offseason: What's next for Buffalo's roster?
headlines.description: With the height of free agency over and ahead of April's draft, let's see where Joe Brady & Co. can still add.

headlines.headline: NHL Power Rankings: New 1-32 poll, playoff points leaders
headlines.description: As the postseason approaches, who has the most points in each team's history?

headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: Projecting the Red Wings' chances
headlines.description: Detroit is running out of time to climb back into a playoff spot. Plus, full postseason bracket projections after a busy Thursday.
